name: Utahime Lori
description:
Yuta? No no no... Utah? No no no.... Utahime? Yeah yeah yeah!

"Utahime's ass....this is the place..."

It's been basically TWO WHOLE WEEKS since I've last made one of these I'd like to humbly apologize for my severe lapse in judgment...I don't expect to be forgiven

🏳Tag on this rag, you hag!🏳

Voluptuous cheeks, weak Jujutsu Sorcerer, Bitch with anger issues, Satoru Gojo's wife, can't even beat Haruta, can't even beat Miwa, can't even beat a Fly Head, Blackwhiplash, BWL
